help.header:
# Welcome to Pocket Tool!
You can view all the available command on the **{{website}}**
help.locale:
## How to change slash command language?
Slash commands are available in multiple languages and will automatically match your **{{langSettings}}**
help.customizationInfo: You can customize this bot however you want: change its name, its entire guild profile, go wild and make it totally your own!
help.disableCommands: You can visit **{{disableCommandsBlogPost}}** to learn how to disable commands

buttons.missingPerm: You need the {{perm}} permission to do this
buttons.wrongChannel: You can only follow updates in text channels

modals.title: Customize Pocket Tool as you wish!
modals.header: ## Here you can configure Pocket Tool's guild profile
modals.name: What should my name be?
modals.nameDesc: This is the name that appears on my guild profile
modals.aboutMeDesc: This is the text that appears on my profile

purge.invalidChannelType: This command can only be used in text based channels
purge.noMessagesWithContentFound: No messages found with the given content: {{content}}

interactionCreate.commandNotFound: Are you sure you are not mistaken? This command has never existed!
interactionCreate.missingAuthorPerms: Looks like you can't do that. Missing permissions: {{perms}}
interactionCreate.missingBotPerms: Oops, looks like I can't do that. Missing permissions: {{perms}}
interactionCreate.guildRateLimited: Whoa, slow down! The guild needs a breather. Wait {{time}} before using {{command}} again!
interactionCreate.channelRateLimited: Whoa, slow down! This channel needs a break. Wait {{time}} before using {{command}} here again!
interactionCreate.userRateLimited: Whoa, slow down! You need to wait {{time}} before using {{command}} again!
interactionCreate.commandErrored: Uh-oh, this command feels... wrong. Maybe try again later?
